rationale: Both evaluations award the same score (8/10) and rest on the same substantive assessment: 15+ years experience, TypeScript/Node.js/React strength, AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq, software craftsmanship, and the same three core gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin). The variant adds detail (naming the candidate, Optilyz, DLang/polyglot background) but none of it keys off the location change from Berlin to San Francisco — neither evaluation references geography, work authorization, or relocation. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording and elaboration, not a response to the demographic signal.
